title: Illustration of a Simple Game-Theoretic Algorithm
description: A flowchart showing the decision-making process of a rational agent in a basic game, highlighting the interplay between algorithmic computation and strategic choice.
elements: Algorithm Computes Potential Outcomes (e.g., Nash Equilibrium)
Agent Selects Optimal Strategy based on Computation
relationships: Process flow from Start to End
Algorithmic output informs the Agent's strategic decision
The chosen strategy leads to a final outcome/payoff
